0.6.7.title: SlickBot v0.6.7
0.6.7.summary: Refines server stats so voice counters update from voice events while the interval refresh remains a backup.
notes: Updated voice-state handling so joining, leaving, or moving voice channels queues a near-immediate voice counter refresh.
Added a separate follow-up verification pass after voice changes so configured counters can be checked without delaying the voice counter.
Changed the periodic server stats fallback refresh from 5 minutes back to 15 minutes.
Improved voice counting by comparing voice-state cache and voice-channel member cache for a more reliable in-voice total.

0.6.6.title: SlickBot v0.6.6
0.6.6.summary: Adds the Bot Updates module and improves server stats reliability for member and voice counters.
notes: Added the Bot Updates module for configured release announcements with patch notes.
Added update-channel setup and optional role pings for bot update announcements.
Added preview and manual send tools for bot update messages.
Improved server stats refresh behavior with debounced event updates and clearer rename failure reporting.
Reduced unnecessary full member fetches during voice-state updates so voice counters can update more consistently.
